title: Uptowns Stasis Rod
description: Adds stasi rod. You can cast a rod on a pressure plate and then enter nether portal. Has a great config with a lot of customazibilitie
body:
This plugin adds ability to use the fishing rod as a tool to power a pressure plate.

<details>
<summary>How to use</summary>
You can cast a rod on a pressure plate and then shift to spawn the armor stand

or

Use /stasisRod while holding a fishing rod to spawn the armor stand.

and when you want to use it just pull the rod

aliases to the command: /stasisRod , /sRod , /sr , rod


</details>

has a great config!



<details>
<summary>Config!</summary>

#Stasis Rod config

#==================== modes =====================

#insted of spawning a armor stand when you use the fishing rod the armor stand spawns on command and stays there till u pull the fishing rod
#the armor stand is small and invisible
#if you had a fishing rod but you lost it and you want to get rid of the armorstand just bind another fishing rod
#if you set it to false it will spawn a armor stand when you use the fishing rod
#↳it may give you a litlle LITLLE bit of performance but it's really up to you

alaways-armorstanmd: true


#just deletes the custom data of the fishing rod after use.

one-use: true

#instead of saving with a command you can now save by fishing on to you're pressure plate and sneaking
#note: once you have already fished and the hook is on presssure plate then you can sneak!

save-fishing: true


#checks if you saved on pressure plate!

check-if-pressureplate: true


#ONLY if alaways-armorstanmd is true
#Saves the coordinats the vanilla way which means when you enter the nether portal with the 
hook on pressureplate

vanilla-saving: true


#==================== durablitie =====================


#this functions makes it so if it's true the stasis rod will have 4 durabilitie and once it is used it will destroy the rod


destroy-rod: false



#==================== meta =====================


#set "" to not rename it
#changes the name of the rod once it saved

rod-name: "stasis rod"

#player can set custom name

custom-name: true


#show cord in lore on the fishing rod

show-cords: false

#==================== looks =====================

#adds a enchantment glint to a fishing rod when saved
#keep in mind that it will stay with this glint for the whole time

enchantment-glint: false




#==================== chunks =====================

#how many of chunks it should load when you use the fishing rod

chunks: 4


#for how many seconds it should load the chunks

chunks-sec: 4


#==================== messages =====================

saving-sRod: "<grey>stasisRod</grey><dark_grey>:</dark_grey> You saved location to you're fishing rod"
not-holding-fishing-rods: "<grey>stasisRod</grey><dark_grey>:</dark_grey> You are not holding any fishing rods"

</details>
